reviews.review_description:
I love this game. It’s really fun and I really really love fishing in real life and my biggest fish is a 42 pound blue cat fish and I love the creative fish that you have in this game and I also like how you can make public or private servers and the people that are in this game are sometimes really really nice. I found a lot of VR ￼friends on this game.




(Can you please give me admin?)

This was the first thing i played when i got my first vr. I come back and play the game and nostalgic memories hit me. 

best fishing vr game in meta history please never shut it down 
y'all made my vr history peak.
Most people that say 1 star say they’re bored because all you do is fish… ITS A FISHING GAME what do you expect.

Very addicting game and it makes it fun to talk and fish very chill. All I would say is make some more maps public servers except for ocean lake. Also great job on the twist in the story once you catch the prehistoric perch!

I’ve tried to play this game multiple times and I still don’t know how to use the games mechanics, there’s not even a tutorial that helps you figure out the mechanics, and the game is boring when you find out how.. it’s not worth spending 10 mins of your life on this game..
works well

The gameplay is ok, but the graphics look very primitive for 2026.  It uses simple models, plain textures, and the fishing line isn't rendered at all for some reason.  The Quest 3 resolution boost doesn't do much to improve it.

Overall it doesn't look that much different than the old Oculus Go version.

I'd much rather it had a complete graphical overhaul for its tenth birthday rather than a new fishing pole.

reviews.review_title: i love this game when i was little 🥲🥲
reviews.review_description: This game made me happy and fun with joy and i love this game when i was a kid i got this game back in 2021 and i love it and now in 2026 i coming back to this game thank you for reading this 🥲🥲🥲🥲🥲🥲

This game is very addictive and very chill. The whole base of the game is to catch fish, sell them to buy better equipment, missions to complete, and relaxation. It's simple to play, unlike some other games, and the graphics are through the roof, outstandingly beautiful! Catching the fish takes patients and excitement. When you join a public lobby, everybody is family friendly, very nice, and chill. Sit in a comfy chair, catch fish, and enjoy. The view is majestic! If your a chill  nature type of person, I highly, thoroughly, recommend installing this game. Five stars for sure!
￼This is a nice game but it needs more updates and more spots to fish

Personally I think this is a great game but fishing in real life is so much easier  than this game a popsicle fights like a great white shark overall a great game. And I would like to add I'm a fisherman myself and it is good to play with some friends.
W

This app. is great! But the only new thing lately is the daily catch. After playing the games 20 times or more, I'm ready for a new fishing course. Hopefully, it's a multi-player game so I can play with my 7 friends. It would be cool to have pretend snacks or popcorn to feed the fishes. We need something new to buy because I have lots of stars and coins to buy stuff but not anything to buy. Love the scavenger hunt game, but don't know how to compete with my cousin. That would be fun, if we could. Please, bring a new course or add to game you already started because I have all the 3 star fishes and still waiting for the continue to start.
I think this game is so fun because of multiplayer weapon variety and the different maps and difficulty
I can literally sit on my floor and sit on my headset for hours just playing that game. It’s so relaxing. It’s so fun and when you catch new fish, it’s like a whole new journey.￼
Its been 10 years and i forgot about it before the first one
I love that you put multiplayer but it’s time for some new fish and levels. DLC’s or something. Great game

reviews.review_title: Great game for basics, but fun for alll!
reviews.review_description: If you are just starting off with the quest or quest 2, it’s a perfect game to learn the motion and mechanics of the device. But even two years later I still play this game. It’s a fun game to play￼! And For the price you cannot lose.￼ ￼it’s a lot of fun in these clever, scenic places! The developers are still adding updates. ￼￼It’s a great game to just take it easy ￼and it’s a blast!￼
This game absolutely sucks,the fishing physics are terrible, the story is terrible, just, the whole game sucks
i was sitting there for 13 minutes trying to catch a fish and did not catch the fish
The game is very fun, and when you're bored or stressed just come play this game. 10/10. Also there is a tutorial on how to reel.

For a free game this is absolutely worth downloading. The graphics are very good and it is a very chill casual game. The story isn't anything to crazy but fun enough. It is pretty repetitive and boring after a while though
Its a cool game but it gets very repetitive the fish keeps swimming away no matter how many times you reel it in.  it keeps happening to the point where it seems like there's no progress

So this game is amazing..it’s fun to play against people, and sell fish if I could rate past five it would be 100 because it’s awesome but review out of 10




10/10 would fish again

I would Never usually never give any fishing game or one of my favorite hockey games a bad rating so I’m giving this a five star and I will change my rating when I do play it but I already know it’s gonna be really good and thank you for making the game. ￼

I can’t believe it is free. Some fishing areas are like meditation retreat. Thank you devs:)

The game is amazing, my first meta quest game and in my opinion the best free game ever, but I miss content updates, after you finish the missions and catch all the fish the game becomes boring, that forest map would be so cool if it were free, it also needs to add new items to improve in the mall with in-game money, as well as the baits and new types of fish, other than that I loved the game, very well made and beautiful maps, just update please

I like the game.When I join a public group with all whites in it. I get kicked out because I'm black..One guy was teasing about my hair style and had everyone laughing..Then I got the message I was kicked out by host..A very racist game

developer_response.body:
Subject: We're deeply sorry to hear this

Hello,

Thank you for reaching out, and we're truly sorry you had to experience such unacceptable behavior in Bait!

We want to be very clear: racism and any kind of discrimination have absolutely no place in our game or community. The situation you described is not something we take lightly. Our End User License Agreement strictly prohibits such conduct, and we are continuously working to improve our tools and moderation to prevent it.

Please make sure to report the users involved using the in-game report feature — this helps us investigate and take appropriate action. And again, we're very sorry this happened to you. Your voice matters, and we’re committed to making Bait! a safe and welcoming space for everyone.

Best regards,
The Bait team

reviews.review_description: fun
Beautiful spots, simple but satisfying fishing, and just a cozy place to hang between bigger titles.
i love fishing irl and i could actually cast my baitcaster how i cast in real life but there needs to be new rods and reels and maps

I have almost completed the game, been playing it for a little under a week, it is very underrated wish it got more attention lol. I definitely recommend this to anybody looking at it, you kinda have to stay consistent with it and it is a bit repetitive but it is a very calming game, I think it’s really fun and I really want to see new things added. (Plus it’s free) props to y’all !

I hate the way when I catch a fish and it keeps swimming away many times no matter what fish items I use. Now from Multiplayer boat racing is good but kinda hard to control and throwing rocks on the water to make them skip is useless! The only game in multiplayer that seems fun is treasure hunt. I didn’t get into this game that much cause I wasn’t that much of a fan and now I don’t feel like it anymore.
It's so fun I lost track of time
Please add 1 handed friendly add more realistic fish but other than that its a good game

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing "Bait!", for one handed mode there is a setting where you can change mode of reeling in to accommodate this. It is available after finishing the tutorial in the settings menu.

In "Bait!" we have a colorful and cartoony art style that does not aim for realism but encourages playful experiences - we hope you can enjoy it even though it is not realistic. Thank you for giving us your input.

reviews.review_description: The game is amazing solo and sometimes when in multiplayer but sometimes the other players can be pretty racist and when you try to confront them you just get kicked out. Good and addicting and multiplayer is fun when it wants to be!
Game sucks i cant even reel in a fish

While I love realVr fishing, this is actually a nice alternative especially since it’s free. But besides that the game is just straight up fun and relaxing. The environments are charming, lots of variety in fish, and multiple locations. Definitely one of the better free games I’ve come across. Would definitely recommend.
So first it would be really cool if you could take off the bobber and only use the bait as a swimming bait second the fish finger fish sucks thx

reviews.review_title: Pass fish and game for the whole family
reviews.review_description: 10 out of 10. Very calming. I have a very stressful life. I play this game for for a little while after work and I am as happy as can be. It's not too difficult, but it's challenging and it's very funny. Kid friendly and adult friendly

developer_response.body:
Hello, sorry to hear that. The game servers usually work well and we rarely hear about these types of issues. If there was an issue with the game servers it was a temporary glitch so we would like to welcome you to try again!

Atlas, customer support
